headline: Is Aon’s (AON) Tech-Focused Leadership Shuffle Quietly Reframing Its Long-Term Competitive Edge?
summary: Aon has reshaped its senior leadership, with Anne Corona now CEO of North America, Lori Goltermann taking on the Vice Chair role into 2027, and Farheen Dam becoming CEO of Enterprise Clients and Chief Client Officer, while also advancing analytics partnerships and stablecoin settlement initiatives across its insurance and reinsurance businesses. These moves highlight how Aon is tying leadership succession to technology-driven offerings, from delegated authority automation to clinically...
